title: Local Field-Start Preflight Export
objective: Add a browser-local field-start preflight export that bundles current Project Miner Temp Power field-prep context into one no-write JSON artifact before any field authorization, durable field record, production tracking, assignment, schedule, or status path is admitted.
scope: Add an Export Field Start Preflight action to the existing Field Prep Outputs rail.

Download one JSON artifact that includes candidate identity, field shape, field-prep queue counts, field-prep coverage counts, field-prep agenda counts, linked field-prep artifact names, preflight readiness items, and blocked field/production boundaries.
Keep the export local-only and informational.
Extend the focused Playwright smoke to prove the downloaded field-start preflight artifact and zero mutation requests.
not_allowed: No Supabase, Render, Vercel, or Olares action.
No secret access or secret rotation.
No backend route or mutation route change.

No project import, workpackage rows, task rows, apparatus rows, field work authorization, assignment, schedule, status, durable field record, production tracking, workbook macro, or workbook writeback.
No service, auth, DNS, ingress, or control-plane widening.

field_start_gate.note: This lane creates local preflight context only. Field work authorization, assignment, schedule, status, durable field records, and production tracking remain blocked until a later admitted packet owns those write paths.

validation_steps: rg -n "PM Lane 148|Export Field Start Preflight|field-start-preflight|pm_lane_148_local_field_start_preflight_v1|mutationRequests\)\.toHaveLength\(0\)" PROJECT_STATUS.md docs/operations ops/agents apps/operations-web
validation_result: PASS: operations-web typecheck passed, operations-web production build passed, focused PM import-intake Playwright smoke passed with 1 passed, packet JSON parsed, guardrail search confirmed PM Lane 148/field-start-preflight/zero-mutation evidence plus Desktop Codex parked language, and git diff --check passed.
sidecar_result: Desktop Codex NETA comparative-audit and topic-spine design closeouts remain untracked and intentionally parked for a separate technical-authority review lane. They are not staged into PM Lane 148.
next_recommended_lane: Use this field-start preflight as no-write Temp Power readiness context. The next PM lane may either prepare a separate field authorization/tracking design packet or pause for the explicit PM Lane 142 live approval admission before any approval POST or import mutation.
